headline: Teledyne Microwave UK Introduces New Wideband Limiter for Advanced Radar Electronic Support Measures and Electronic Warfare Systems
summary: SHIPLEY, England, March 03, 2026--Teledyne Microwave UK, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), has announced the release of its new Wideband Limiter, a passive 0.1–20 GHz RF protection module designed to enhance the survivability of Radar Electronic Support Measures (R-ESM) and wider Electronic Warfare (EW) systems operating in increasingly complex threat environments.

content.title: Teledyne Microwave UK Introduces New Wideband Limiter for Advanced Radar Electronic Support Measures and Electronic Warfare Systems
content.summary: SHIPLEY, England, March 03, 2026--Teledyne Microwave UK, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), has announced the release of its new Wideband Limiter, a passive 0.1–20 GHz RF protection module designed to enhance the survivability of Radar Electronic Support Measures (R-ESM) and wider Electronic Warfare (EW) systems operating in increasingly complex threat environments.

thumbnail.caption: Passive Wideband Limiter protecting against high-power pulsed and continuous wave RF signals
